response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of solid software engineering experience with strong fundamentals (TDD, CI/CD, testing), but the resume shows no substantial C++ professional experience beyond a 6-month stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015. The role demands 5-10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows, SQL Server/Oracle expertise, and capital markets/fixed income domain knowledge — none of which appear in the candidate's profile. Primary stacks are JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and Node.js with MongoDB, and there is zero financial services or investment banking exposure.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship foundation (TDD, CI/CD, testing, pairing)
Brief exposure to C/C++ at National Instruments on a developer-tools product
Senior engineering experience at reputable companies (Stripe, Shopify)
concerns: No meaningful C++ experience in the last decade; far short of 5-10 years required
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; primary database experience is MongoDB and generic SQL
Zero capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domain exposure

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain knowledge
